overlay_content.name: Overlay Content
overlay_content.value: Genuine Nissan Accessories are custom-fit & durability-tested for your Rogue. [*] Images shown for illustrative purposes only. For complete limited warranty details, see your Nissan dealer and read the vehicle’s Warranty Information Booklet.

html_content.name: Custom HTML Content
html_content.value:
ROGUE EXTERIOR ACCESSORIES

Make a lasting impression

Stand out with a wide array of accessories that put your sense of style on display and help guard against the unexpected. Your Rogue can be equipped with many available accessories, such as Roof Rail Crossbars, a Hatch Tent, and a Satin Chrome Rear Bumper Protector.

html_content.name: Custom HTML Content
html_content.value:
Exterior Ground Lighting w/ Logo

  • Just click for a sense of security with lights that brighten up the area beneath and around your vehicle
  • Illuminates the ground near the front doors with the Nissan logo
  • Goes on when you press the key fob, press the entry button, or open doors

MSRP $472 [*] Price is Manufacturer's Suggested Retail Price (MSRP). MSRP excludes installation (except if factory-installed), taxes and other costs, and is subject to change without prior notice. Dealer sets actual price. Pictures are for informational purposes only.

View Item

html_content.name: Custom HTML Content
html_content.value:
Clear Hood Protector

  • Transparent design provides protection without sacrificing style
  • Easy, no-drill installation

MSRP $179 [*] Price is Manufacturer's Suggested Retail Price (MSRP). MSRP excludes installation (except if factory-installed), taxes and other costs, and is subject to change without prior notice. Dealer sets actual price. Pictures are for informational purposes only.

View Item

html_content.name: Custom HTML Content
html_content.value:
Nissan Tailgate Audio by KICKER®

  • Tailgate in style with a IP66-rated weatherproof portable Bluetooth® speaker [*] The Nissan names, logos and slogans are trademarks owned by or licensed to Nissan Motor Co. Ltd. and/or its North American subsidiaries. Other trademarks and trade names are those of their respective owners.

  • Built-in FM tuner, AUX jack, and USB charging port

  • Bluetooth® range of up to 100 feet [*] The Nissan names, logos and slogans are trademarks owned by or licensed to Nissan Motor Co. Ltd. and/or its North American subsidiaries. Other trademarks and trade names are those of their respective owners.

  • Control power, volume, and more using the free KICKER® Connect app [*] The Nissan names, logos and slogans are trademarks owned by or licensed to Nissan Motor Co. Ltd. and/or its North American subsidiaries. Other trademarks and trade names are those of their respective owners.

MSRP $481 [*] Price is Manufacturer's Suggested Retail Price (MSRP). MSRP excludes installation (except if factory-installed), taxes and other costs, and is subject to change without prior notice. Dealer sets actual price. Pictures are for informational purposes only.

View Item

html_content.name: Custom HTML Content
html_content.value:
Hatch Tent

  • Unfolds easily to a 10' x 10' tent, either connected to your Rogue or as a stand-alone
  • 6' x 6' canopy and external rain-fly
  • Also available with 9' x 9' base (see dealer for pricing information)

MSRP $548 [*] Price is Manufacturer's Suggested Retail Price (MSRP). MSRP excludes installation (except if factory-installed), taxes and other costs, and is subject to change without prior notice. Dealer sets actual price. Pictures are for informational purposes only.

View Item

html_content.value:
Satin Chrome Rear Bumper Protector

  • Designed to help prevent scratches and scuffs when loading cargo
  • Easy, no-drill installation

MSRP $153 [*] Price is Manufacturer's Suggested Retail Price (MSRP). MSRP excludes installation (except if factory-installed), taxes and other costs, and is subject to change without prior notice. Dealer sets actual price. Pictures are for informational purposes only.

html_content.value:
ROGUE INTERIOR, Lighting and Tech ACCESSORIES

Interior designer: you

Showcase your creativity with a wide array of accessories. Take the time to choose pieces that best express your personality.

html_content.name: Custom HTML Content

modules.title: All-Season Floor Mats - High Wall Liner

html_content.name: Custom HTML Content
html_content.value:
All-Season Floor Mats — High Wall Liners (4-piece set)

  • Stepping in from the rain or snow? You need a set of All-Season Floor Mats — High Wall Liners 
  • Custom-made of durable and long-wearing material
  • Driver and front-passenger mats secure with a grommet hole/positioning hook system

MSRP $200 [*] Price is Manufacturer's Suggested Retail Price (MSRP). MSRP excludes installation (except if factory-installed), taxes and other costs, and is subject to change without prior notice. Dealer sets actual price. Pictures are for informational purposes only.

View Item

html_content.name: Custom HTML Content
html_content.value:
Cargo Net

  • Fight the forces of cargo chaos with a Cargo Net that helps keep items in place
  • Secures with tie-down hooks in cargo area 
  • Flexible, nylon cord

MSRP $63 [*] Price is Manufacturer's Suggested Retail Price (MSRP). MSRP excludes installation (except if factory-installed), taxes and other costs, and is subject to change without prior notice. Dealer sets actual price. Pictures are for informational purposes only.

View Item

html_content.name: Custom HTML Content
html_content.value:
Seat Cover W/ Storage

  • Designed to be installed under child car seat
  • Helps protect your rear seats from child car seat indentations and spills
  • Storage pockets for diapers, wipes, snacks, and other necessities
  • Compatible with LATCH System

MSRP $86.60 [*] Price is Manufacturer's Suggested Retail Price (MSRP). MSRP excludes installation (except if factory-installed), taxes and other costs, and is subject to change without prior notice. Dealer sets actual price. Pictures are for informational purposes only.

View Item

html_content.name: Custom HTML Content
html_content.value:
Dual Camera Drive Recorder

  • Points forward to capture what is in front of the vehicle, points to the inside to catch what happens in the cabin
  • G-sensor can turn on the interior camera in case of break-in
  • Saves footage that can be shared with insurance, police, or family members

MSRP $376 [*] Price is Manufacturer's Suggested Retail Price (MSRP). MSRP excludes installation (except if factory-installed), taxes and other costs, and is subject to change without prior notice. Dealer sets actual price. Pictures are for informational purposes only.

View Item

html_content.name: Custom HTML Content
html_content.value:
Interior Accent Lighting

  • LEDs with 20 pre-programmed color options light up the footwells and front cup holders
  • Easily control light color and on/off function with a single knob
  • Works with the vehicle’s interior lighting when the door is opened

MSRP $311 [*] Price is Manufacturer's Suggested Retail Price (MSRP). MSRP excludes installation (except if factory-installed), taxes and other costs, and is subject to change without prior notice. Dealer sets actual price. Pictures are for informational purposes only.

html_content.value:
NISSAN AFFILIATED: YAKIMA® ACCESSORIES

How bold will you go?

Ready to go bigger, bolder, and even get a little dirtier? Make every day an adventure with Affiliated: Yakima® accessories.
